summary: Portfolio momentum continues accelerating across 6 healthy projects, but chief-scout's failing test suite still blocks critical development tooling and neutralworking's deployment failures prevent portfolio updates. Director remains completely stalled requiring intervention decision.

soft-power.one_liner: Maintaining exceptional velocity with 24 commits this week, still needs CI/CD setup

director.one_liner: Still completely stalled for 30+ days, game project remains abandoned

chief-scout.one_liner: High activity with 87 commits but critical test failures still blocking functionality

brain-levelup.one_liner: Strong acceleration with 4 commits, needs deployment monitoring

crumble.one_liner: Dormant for 30+ days with working CI/CD, likely abandoned

neutralworking.one_liner: Ongoing development but deployment failures blocking portfolio updates

head-of-product.one_liner: Strong momentum with 11 commits, has blocking TODOs to resolve

cross_project_ranking.action: Fix failing test suite (test_red_card, test_injury_sub, test_extra_time) and repair broken workflows
cross_project_ranking.reason: High-priority development tool with broken core functionality blocking team productivity despite high activity

cross_project_ranking.reason: Top-priority visual novel maintaining peak velocity but lacks deployment safety net

cross_project_ranking.action: Resolve 'deploy to coolify' workflow failure to restore automated deployments

cross_project_ranking.action: Make formal archive decision or commit resources to restart development

cross_project_ranking.action: Set up CI/CD pipeline to support exceptional development pace
cross_project_ranking.reason: Engine project hitting peak velocity needs deployment infrastructure for reliability

needs_decision.question: Should this dormant web-app be formally archived?
needs_decision.recommendation: Archive as completed - 30+ days inactivity with working CI/CD indicates natural project completion

needs_decision.recommendation: Archive as cancelled - 30+ days of complete inactivity suggests project should be formally ended
